# Bhuwanta Developers

> Bhuwanta Developers is a Hyderabad-based real estate company delivering HMDA and DTCP approved open plots, villa plots, and farmlands across Hyderabad's growth corridors, including Warangal Highway, Mumbai Highway, and Shabad.

Bhuwanta Developers specializes in legally clear, government-approved (HMDA/DTCP/RERA) residential open plots for first-time buyers, growing families, and NRI investors, with a focus on transparent pricing and Vastu-compliant layouts. The company has 20+ years of leadership experience in Hyderabad's real estate market and has sold 100+ plots to date. Pricing is shared directly with buyers during a consultation and is not published publicly.

## Company
- [About Bhuwanta Developers](https://bhuwanta.com/about): Company background, leadership, and mission
- [Projects](https://bhuwanta.com/projects): Current plot developments across Hyderabad

## Projects
- [S.V. Kanaka Maple Homes](https://bhuwanta.com/projects/sv-kanaka-maple-homes) — Warangal Highway, near Yadagirigutta Temple corridor — DTCP & RERA approved
- [TJR Township](https://bhuwanta.com/projects/tjr-township) — Sangareddy Junction, Mumbai Highway — HMDA & RERA approved
- [Vaibhav County](https://bhuwanta.com/projects/vaibhav-county) — Sadashivpet, Mumbai Highway — DTCP & RERA approved
- [Vian Vally](https://bhuwanta.com/projects/vian-vally) — Shabad, NH-44 Bangalore Highway — HMDA & RERA approved

## Guides
- [How to Verify HMDA/DTCP Approval in Telangana](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/verify-hmda-dtcp-approval-telangana): Step-by-step verification process using official Telangana government portals
- [Hyderabad Real Estate Investment 2026](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/hyderabad-real-estate-investment-2026-best-areas-open-plots): Best areas, open plot vs apartment comparison, and 2026 investment trends
- [HMDA vs DTCP Approved Plots](https://bhuwanta.com/hmda-vs-dtcp-plots-hyderabad): Complete comparison of approval types, pricing profile, and appreciation potential
- [Open Plots in Shabad Guide](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/open-plots-shabad-hyderabad-hmda-approved-guide): HMDA approval, what drives value, and how to verify a Shabad plot
- [DTCP vs HMDA Plots in Shadnagar](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/dtcp-vs-hmda-plots-shadnagar-buyer-guide): Buyer's guide to approval types in the Shadnagar belt
- [Shabad vs Shadnagar Comparison](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/shabad-vs-shadnagar-investment-comparison): Which growth corridor to invest in
- [Shadnagar Growth Story 2026](https://bhuwanta.com/blog/open-plots-shadnagar-growth-story-2026): Micro-locations, infrastructure drivers, and red flags to check

- [Open Plots in Shabad](https://bhuwanta.com/shabad-open-plots): Vian Vally — HMDA & RERA approved, on the NH-44 corridor
- [Plots Near Shadnagar](https://bhuwanta.com/shadnagar-open-plots): Honest positioning — no Shadnagar inventory yet, nearest verified option is Vian Vally in Shabad

## Contact
